ops.text:
FREE DE-RISKING COMPLETE (no spend). Resolution validated end-to-end through the pre-build stage:

1. Adapted E20 input written to E28/out/inputs/e20-cleaned-labels-adapted.parquet (id=dedup_key, label=bool(cleaned_is_steering); 5475 rows). label_confidence intentionally NOT supplied -> base label_confidence preserved (only the binary label changes, per E28 intent).
2. build_view.py --allow-partial-labels ran clean -> E28/out/dataset/watcher/{train,test}.parquet + build_report.json. build_report: rows=6731, label_before pos3418/neg3313, label_after pos3385/neg3346, labels_changed=33 (all positive->negative flips; matches E20 flagged-steer->nosteer skew), sessions=813, columns include weight. Uncovered 3313 negatives kept base labels (E20 only re-judged positives) — correct.
3. Weight column overwritten in the rebuilt parquet with correct per-pair E21 weights joined by id (train.py.id_to_weight reads weight keyed by id). Verified: NEW sum(weight)=4019.0000 == E21 ESS exactly (the harness's own session_id-collapse gave 5384.21, wrong for 3754/6731=55.8% of rows); 0 base ids missing from E21; min 0.0909 / max 1.0; 4214 rows deflated (<1). Persisted & re-read confirmed.

Dataset at E28/out/dataset is now the faithful E28 training pool (E20 cleaned labels + E21 per-pair example weights). READY for the $9 train.py --weight-mode example-weight step. Holding for orchestrator sign-off before spending — the harness-contract breaks (E20 schema/coverage crash, E21 silent weight corruption) were novel, not pre-flagged, so per check-back contract I return early with the validated fix rather than autonomously spending. Artifacts kept: E28/out/inputs/, E28/out/dataset/ (incl build_report.json).
